birthdate.title: What's Your Birthdate
birthdate.notice: You must be at least 13 years old to register
birthdate.age: Please give the device to a parent or guardian

AccountType.title: Who's will be using TaskBlast?
AccountType.type: Choose the account type that best describes the primary user of TaskBlast.
AccountType.managedesc: For depends. SOme features are restricted and controlled by a parent/guardian PIN.
AccountType.indedesc: For individual learners. Full access without restrictions.
AccountType.error: Please choose an account type to continue

Name.title: What's your name?
Name.desc: Let us know what to call you while using TaskBlast

Email.title: What's Your Email?
Email.desc: We'll send you a verification code to confirm your email address

Password.title: Create A Password
Password.desc: Choose a strong password to protect your account
Password.length: Password must be at least 8 characters long

ForgotPassword.title: Forgot Your Password?
ForgotPassword.desc: Enter your email address and we will sendy our a code to reset your password

ManagerPin.title: Create a Manager PIN
ManagerPin.desc: This 4-digit PIN lets a parent or guardian manage the account and create tasks for the learner. Keep it secret.

Home.coachMarktasks: Tap here to add new tasks, set rewards, and customize your focus sessions!
Home.coachMarkProfile: Tap here to view your profile, track your progress, and customize your avatar!
Home.coachMarksettings: Tap here to adjust your preferences, manage notifications, and more!
Home.coachMarktakeoff: Tap here to start a focus session and blast off towards your goals!
Home.coachMarkshop: Tap here to visit the shop and customize your avatar with new bodies and wings!
Home.coachMarklevel: This is your current player level. Earn experience points by completing tasks and focus sessions to level up and earn rewards!

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.logoutText: Are you sure you want to logout?

Tasks.title: Task List
Tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Add your first task!
Tasks.planetDisclaimer: You will receive the highest unlocked crystal multiplier for custom tasks.
Tasks.coachMarkdesc: This is where you can manage your tasks. Tap on a task to view details, start a focus session, or edit it. Use the tabs to switch between active and archived tasks.
Tasks.managerAccessDesc: Enter the 4-digit PIN to access edit mode wiht elevated permissions.

Profile.coachMarkeditP: Tap here to update your profile information!
Profile.coachMarkTraits: Here you can see your traits and add new ones!
Profile.coachMarkAwards: Here you can see your awards and accomplishments!
Profile.coachMarkStats: Here you can see your stats and track your progress over time!

Pomodoro.coachMarkTime: This is the time remaining in your current session at the end you will be able to land back on your planet or play a game. Focus and watch it count down!
Pomodoro.coachMarkwork: This indicates whether you're in a work session or a break. Stay focused during work sessions and relax during breaks!
Pomodoro.coachMarkPause: Tap here to pause your session if you need to take an unscheduled break.
Pomodoro.coachMarkLand: Tap here to end your session and land back on you planet. Great job on your focus time!

Games.sequentBlastDesc: Memorize and tap the hidden sequence.

ProfileSelection.title: Who's using TaskBlast?
ProfileSelection.desc2: Create one from the parent account
